author: y4rr
content:
Observation: the ferrotorch-optim/tests/ directory contains pre-existing stub files for future sub-phases that were not authored by this dispatch:
- conformance_optim_adam_family.rs (C6.2) — has 2 clippy errors: unused cascade_skip macro (needs #[allow(unused_macros)]), needless_range_loop
- conformance_optim_advanced.rs (C6.3) — has ~20 compile errors: #[non_exhaustive] struct literals, private field access via .params, type mismatch in 1 test, non-constant in array size
- conformance_optim_schedulers.rs (C6.4) — not checked in detail
- conformance_surface_coverage.rs — not checked in detail

These are NOT regressions introduced by C6.1. They pre-existed in the untracked files. C6.2-C6.4 agents will fix them. The C6.1-scoped clippy target (--test conformance_optim_sgd_family) exits 0 with -D warnings.
